title: Mentor rank ladder (v1)
description: The Mentors' Guild rank ladder loaded from data/mentor/ranks.json. Each rank is reached once a mentor's lifetime graduated-mentee count meets its mentees_required threshold, granting a unique milestone title and a shared guild XP perk (mentor_xp_bonus_percent) that applies while the mentor is grouped with their bonded mentee on a shared kill. Higher ranks supersede lower ones for the perk. The loader tolerates unknown properties (AGENTS.md §11).

ranks.description: The rank rungs. Must contain distinct mentees_required thresholds, and the lowest rung must be granted at exactly one graduated mentee.

mentees_required.description: Lifetime graduated mentees needed to reach this rank.

title.description: Unique milestone title granted the moment this rank is reached. Must be unique across achievements, quests, and other mentor ranks, case-insensitively.

mentor_xp_bonus_percent.description: The mentor's own bonus-XP percentage while grouped with their bonded mentee on a shared kill, once this rank is the highest attained.
